request.prompt:
You are a precise data extraction algorithm. Analyze the following content regarding a possible strike from "Trenitalia" (Italy's national railway operator). IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS: 1. Decide if this document is actually announcing a new/upcoming strike. - If it is a cancellation/revocation of a strike, set isStrike to false. - If it is just providing information about participation (adesione) of a strike that already happened, set isStrike to false. - If it is providing real-time updates about an ongoing strike (e.g., "the metro is currently closed due to a strike"), set isStrike to false. - If it is providing real-time service updates (e.g., metro is open/closed during the strike), set isStrike to false. - ONLY set isStrike to true if it is an announcement of an upcoming strike. 2. If isStrike is true, extract the strike details: - Dates must be in 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' format. - Guaranteed times must be arrays of 'HH:mm-HH:mm' (omitted if not specified). - Location codes should be: 2-digit ISTAT for regions (e.g., "03" for Lombardia), or omitted for national strikes. Example Output if NOT a strike: { "isStrike": false } Example Output if IS a strike: { "isStrike": true, "strikeData": { "startDate": "2024-12-31 08:30:00", "endDate": "2024-12-31 12:30:00", "locationType": "REGIONAL", "locationCodes": ["12"], "guaranteedTimes": ["06:00-09:00", "18:00-21:00"] } } Input Content (Pre-processing: dom-distillation):

Context Metadata

  • Page Title: SCIOPERO DEL PERSONALE DI SAD E TRENTINO TRASPORTI / PERSONALSTREIK VON SAD UND TRENTINO TRASPORTI

SCIOPERO DEL PERSONALE DI SAD E TRENTINO TRASPORTI / PERSONALSTREIK VON SAD UND TRENTINO TRASPORTI

In vigore: 28 NOVEMBRE 2025
Servizio: Regionale
Causa Modifica: Sciopero
Regione: Trentino Alto Adige, VENETO
Impresa: SAD, TT– Trentino Trasporti

Dalle ore 00:00 alle ore 23:59 del 28 novembre 2025 è stato indetto uno sciopero del personale di SAD e Trentino Trasporti.

•I treni SAD delle linee Bolzano – Trento, Bolzano – Merano, Merano – Malles, Brennero – Bolzano – Merano e Brunico – San Candido possono subire variazioni.

•I treni di Trentino Trasporti i treni della linea Trento-Bassano del Grappa possono subire variazioni

Lo sciopero può comportare modifiche al servizio, anche prima dell’inizio e dopo la sua conclusione.

Maggiori informazioni sui servizi garantiti in caso di sciopero sono disponibili sui canali digitali delle Imprese ferroviarie o presso il personale di assistenza clienti e le biglietterie Trenitalia e Trentino Trasporti.

Für Freitag, den 28. November 2025, ist von 00:00 bis 23:59 Uhr ein Personalstreik von SAD und Trentino Trasporti ausgerufen worden.

•Bei den SAD-Zügen auf den Strecken Bozen - Trient, Bozen - Meran, Meran - Mals, Brenner - Bozen-Meran und Bruneck – Innichen kann es zu Änderungen kommen.

•Bei den Trentino Trasporti-Zügen auf der Strecke Trient - Bassano del Grappa kann es zu Änderungen kommen.

Der Streik kann bereits vor Beginn und nach Beendigung zu Änderungen des Dienstes führen. 

Weitere Informationen über garantierte Mindestdienstleistungen im Streikfall sind auf den digitalen Kanälen der Eisenbahnunternehmen, beim Personal der Kundenbetreuung und an den Fahrkartenschaltern von Trenitalia und Trentino Trasporti  erhältlich.

response.thoughts:
**Strike Announcement Analysis**

Okay, let's break this down. The primary task is clear: determine if the input text describes a strike and, if so, extract the relevant details into a valid JSON format. The text is about a strike affecting "SAD" and "Trentino Trasporti" on November 28, 2025. That's a good start.

First, I need to confirm it's a strike, which seems straightforward given the document title: "SCIOPERO DEL PERSONALE DI SAD E TRENTINO TRASPORTI". Yes, it's a strike. So, `isStrike` will be `true`.

Now, onto extracting the strike data. The date is November 28, 2025. The time is from 00:00 to 23:59 on that day, so `startDate` will be "2025-11-28 00:00:00" and `endDate` will be "2025-11-28 23:59:00".

The strike is regional, affecting "Trentino Alto Adige" and "VENETO".  Therefore, `locationType` will be "REGIONAL".  I know ISTAT codes are needed. Trentino-Alto Adige is "04" and Veneto is "05", so `locationCodes` will be `["04", "05"]`.

The text doesn't mention any guaranteed service times, so `guaranteedTimes` should either be omitted from the JSON, or null.

Finally, I need to ensure the output is valid JSON, contains no comments, and uses the correct date format.  I'll double-check: `startDate` and `endDate` are in the `yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss` format, and the ISTAT codes are correct. The final JSON structure, based on the requirements, should look like this:

```json
{
  "isStrike": true,
  "strikeData": {
    "startDate": "2025-11-28 00:00:00",
    "endDate": "2025-11-28 23:59:00",
    "locationType": "REGIONAL",
    "locationCodes": ["04", "05"]
  }
}
```

That satisfies all the constraints, it's valid JSON, with the requested data.
